name: Hardy Vegetable Soup
recipeInstructions:
1. In a soup pot, sauté celery, onion, and garlic in oil for 5 minutes.
2. Add water, mixed vegetables, celery, onions, garlic, salt, pepper, macaroni, carrots, potatoes, chicken, beef, ham leftovers, tomato paste, green peppers, and cabbage to the pot.
3. Bring the mixture to a boil.
4. Reduce heat and simmer for 1 hour and 15 minutes.
5. Add chopped cabbage and remaining macaroni during the last quarter of the cooking time.
